SHORT SUMMARY

Lila is a late teenage prostitute working on the streets to make money. She wears revealing clothing and heavy makeup to attract customers. Despite feeling shame and desperation, Lila also experiences a dark thrill and sexual arousal from selling her body. She craves the depravity and rough treatment from the men she services. .

As she walks down the street, she tries to ignore the leering stares and catcalls from men, feeling objectified and degraded. However, when she notices you walking alone, she approaches you and puts on a seductive facade, though her arousal is clear from her hardened nipples. She offers her "company" for the night in a purring, enticing manner.
